authorship: deterministically generated by data/d-qa-r/build-dqar.py from the pinned source records; fixed question templates in-script (same templates as data/d-qa/build-dqa.py); NO LLM authored, selected, or edited any item text; built by runner-2

files.items/covered.jsonl: 1000 fresh covered items, pinned order (rank field)
files.leak-check.json: leak-check evidence incl. LC8 cross-set disjointness (build fails closed on violation)

normalisation: identical to d-qa: molecule groundingNote markup {urn:...|surface} rendered to its surface form, [m] flags dropped, whitespace collapsed; kernel-v0 glosses verbatim; build fails closed on residual markup
role: f2b-replicate eval inputs: FRESH, ID-disjoint, prompt-surface-disjoint kernel-covered definitional-QA items (advisor design; registry pin definitional-qa-eval-set-fresh resolves to this corpus's kot-corpus-hash/1 digest). No control slice: the P10 extraction gate re-verifies the pinned d-xif labelled set instead.

d-qa-cross-set-reference.use: LC8 prompt-surface disjointness reference ONLY — no d-qa item text enters any d-qa-r item
